name: Prison Break
description: The stone corridors of the oubliette echo with the clank of iron boots. A prisoner whispers through the bars, begging for freedom. To reach the cell keys, you must slip past three patrols and a watchful turnkey who never seems to blink.
failureConsequence: A guard spots your shadow and raises the alarm. You are seized and thrown into a cell yourself, losing a full day before a sympathetic jailer lets you slip away at dawn.
